_request_preview: [turn-2] How much will I owe for a $1,750.55 outpatient procedure on my Silver plan?
content: You have $1,200 remaining on your $2,000 Silver deductible. For a $1,750.55 outpatient procedure, that remaining deductible applies first, and the leftover $550.55 is subject to 20% member coinsurance ($110.11). In total you owe **$1,310.11**, and the plan pays **$440.44**.
